channel.title: Veila Tarot
channel.description: A quiet bilingual Celtic Cross tarot reading.

item.title: Veila Tarot — Begin a Celtic Cross Reading
item.description: A quiet bilingual Celtic Cross tarot reading.

item.title: The Celtic Cross Tarot Spread — A Beginner's Guide
item.description: The most enduring ten-card tarot spread. History, position meanings, and how to read it.

item.title: Daily Tarot Card — A One-Card Practice
item.description: One tarot card drawn fresh each day. A small, considered practice for reflection.

item.title: All Veila Tarot Pages — Site Index
item.description: A directory of every page on Veila Tarot, grouped by area.

item.title: The Major Arcana — All 22 Tarot Trumps Explained | Veila
item.description: The 22 Major Arcana tarot cards, from The Fool to The World. Brief descriptions with links to each card's full meaning page.

item.title: The Minor Arcana — Four Suits, 56 Cards | Veila
item.description: The 56 Minor Arcana tarot cards across four suits: Cups, Wands, Swords, and Pentacles. Browse each suit and its fourteen cards.

item.title: The Suit of Cups — All 14 Cups Tarot Card Meanings | Veila
item.description: The Suit of Cups in tarot — water, feeling, relationship. Meanings for all 14 Cups cards, Ace through King, with links to full readings.

item.title: The Suit of Swords — All 14 Swords Tarot Card Meanings | Veila
item.description: The Suit of Swords in tarot — air, mind, conflict. Meanings for all 14 Swords cards, Ace through King, with links to full readings.

item.title: The Suit of Wands — All 14 Wands Tarot Card Meanings | Veila
item.description: The Suit of Wands in tarot — fire, will, vocation. Meanings for all 14 Wands cards, Ace through King, with links to full readings.

item.title: The Suit of Pentacles — All 14 Pentacles Tarot Card Meanings | Veila
item.description: The Suit of Pentacles in tarot — earth, body, craft, money. Meanings for all 14 Pentacles cards, Ace through King, with links to full readings.

item.title: Tarot for Love & Relationships | Veila
item.description: How to use tarot for love questions — common cards in love readings, what they really mean, and which spread to use.

item.title: Tarot for Career, Work & Calling | Veila
item.description: How to use tarot for career questions — common cards in career readings, what they mean for work, and which spread fits the question.

item.title: Yes/No Tarot Readings — Method & Card List | Veila
item.description: How to do a yes/no tarot reading — single-card method, which cards lean yes and which lean no, and when to use a fuller spread instead.
